title: Overlay Zone Artifact
description: Output of the layout-preprocessing stage of the liquidretail detect pipeline. One document per DetectRun (see `mediaId` + `runId` fields) consumed by downstream ad-layout generators.

mediaId.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the Media this artifact describes

runId.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the DetectRun that produced it

zones.description: Map of aspect-ratio label to array of variant analyses. Ratio labels are human-readable (e.g. '5:4', '1:1', '4:5', '9:16', '1.91:1'). Each ratio holds one or more variants — a 'base' variant is a crop of the source image chosen by the judge; other variants pair with an AI provider (e.g. provider='gemini', variant='extension').

provider.description: AI provider that produced this image, or null for a 'base' variant (source-image crop).

variant.description: Variant name. 'base' = judge-picked crop. For AI variants, examples: 'extension' (outpaint), 'generation' (fresh background).

candidateId.description: Stable id for this candidate within the run (e.g. '9:16-ext-gemini').

imageUrl.description: Cloudinary URL of the image analyzed.

oneOf.description: null when analysis failed for this image (non-fatal; other variants on the same run can still be populated).

schemaVersion.description: SemVer-ish. Consumers should refuse or warn on unknown majors.

imageWidth.description: Pixel width of the analyzed image. Null if probing failed.

imageHeight.description: Pixel height of the analyzed image.

primarySubjectRectPct.description: Top-level pointer at the hard-rule product rect. Always derivable from restrictions[] but lifted here to save every consumer from writing the same filter. Null if no product-classification restriction was emitted.

densityGrid.description: Gemini-emitted visual busy-ness heatmap. 0 = empty/uniform, 1 = busy/subject.

brightnessGrid.description: Server-computed luminance per cell at matching dimensions. 0 = black, 1 = white. Used to pick overlay text color.

restrictions.description: Regions overlays must avoid. A restriction is 'active' at conservation level S iff strictness >= (1 - S). The hard rule is that classification='product' has strictness=1.0 and is always active.

classification.description: Kind of region. Drives default strictness band.

strictness.description: 1.0 = always excluded. Default bands: product=1.0, face=0.9, secondary_subject=0.6-0.8, text=0.4-0.6, object=0.2-0.3.

reason.description: Short sentence explaining what's in the rect.

rectPct.description: Rectangle in normalized [0,1] coordinates. (0,0) = top-left, (1,1) = bottom-right. x2 > x1 and y2 > y1.
